zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I於1197年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也時，他的父親Raoul De Roye I32歲，母親Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté25歲。他於1228年與Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1255年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯哈布希享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I于1197年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也时，他的父亲Raoul De Roye I32岁，母亲Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté25岁。他于1228年与Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre在法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1255年在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯哈布希享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roye,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian Roje: from a pet form of Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘generation, family, relatives’, e.g. Rodimir.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Roj, Rój or Roja (see Roy 4).

variants.name: Roy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Normand, Andre, Jacques, Marcel, Emile, Laurent, Pierre, Cecile, Donat, Gilles.  Indian Dipak, Sumit, Amit, Ajit, Dipankar, Partha, Ranjan, Shyamal, Aloke, Amitava, Chitra, Gautam.
Scottish: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Gaelic ruadh ‘red’. Compare Reed .
English (of Norman origin): from Old French roi ‘king’, used as a nickname (see 3 below) and also as a personal name. Compare Ray 2.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I was born in 1197, in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Raoul De Roye I, was 32 and his mother, Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté, was 25. He married Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre in 1228, in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1255, in Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I est né en 1197, à Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Raoul De Roye I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre en 1228, à Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1255, à Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I 1197 in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul De Roye I 32 und seine Mutter Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté 25. Er hat 1228 in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1255 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy Iが1197年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンロイで生まれた時，父Raoul De Roye Iは32歳，母Marie-Marguerite De La Fertéは25歳であった。1228年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンロイでJeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1255年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスチャンボウルシで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I(이)가 1197년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 로예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul De Roye I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1228년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 로예에서 Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1255년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 챔보우르시에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I nasceu em 1197, em Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Raoul De Roye I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre em 1228, em Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1255, em Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I родился в 1197 г. в местности рои, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul De Roye I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre в 1228 г. в местности рои, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1255 г. в местности чамбурси, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I nació en 1197, en Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Raoul De Roye I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre en 1228, en Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1255, en Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
